code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut tokens_count = 0
mut output = ""
mut current = ""
mut in_token = false
mut idx = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while idx < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, idx)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_token
      if tokens_count % 2 == 0
        if output == ""
          output = current
        else
          output = "#{output} #{current}"
        end
      end
      tokens_count = tokens_count + 1
      current = ""
      in_token = false
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    in_token = true
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end

if in_token
  if tokens_count % 2 == 0
    if output == ""
      output = current
    else
      output = "#{output} #{current}"
    end
  end
end

println(output)
